title: The Meaning of Make-Believe
abstract: The Work of the Imagination . Paul L. Harris. Blackwell, Oxford, 2000. 234 pp. $59.95, £50. ISBN 0-631-21885-8. Paper, $26.95, £14.99. ISBN 0-631-21886-6. Refuting long-held views that the fantasies of children reflect primitive and irrational thought, Harris explores how imagination contributes to cognitive and emotional development.
